cases.title: Client calls a service RPC through generated surfaces
cases.description: A client participant calls a service-owned RPC, the service receives authenticated caller context, and the client receives the typed response.

cases.title: Service startup waits for deployment approval
cases.description: A service participant can start only after the deployment authority approves its service identity and resources.

cases.title: App client obtains an approved identity grant
cases.description: An app client completes identity grant approval and uses the approved identity for Trellis client access.

cases.title: Client starts and watches a caller-visible operation
cases.description: A client starts an operation through public operation APIs and observes terminal status through the watch surface.

cases.title: Client publishes and subscribes to contract events
cases.description: A client with publish and subscribe authority sends a contract event and another authorized participant receives it.

cases.title: Client event publish is denied without publish authority
cases.description: A client with subscribe-only authority cannot publish a contract event.

cases.title: Client observes service health heartbeat events
cases.description: A client can observe public service health heartbeat behavior exposed by Trellis health surfaces.

cases.title: Client reads and updates contract-owned shared state
cases.description: A client uses public state APIs to read and update contract-owned shared state with matching semantics across languages.

cases.title: Client uploads and downloads file transfer data
cases.description: A client transfers file data through public transfer APIs and verifies the returned metadata and bytes.

cases.title: Client consumes service feed updates
cases.description: A client subscribes to a service-owned feed and observes published updates through the public feed surface.

cases.title: Service uses bound resources during a client RPC
cases.description: A client call reaches a service that uses Trellis-provided resource bindings through public service handles.

cases.title: Service runs local job work behind a client-visible workflow
cases.description: A service uses Trellis jobs for private execution while the client observes the public API outcome.

cases.title: Device client activates and connects with issued credentials
cases.description: A known device completes activation and uses the resulting connection information as a Trellis client.
